item.title: Version 1.118.5
item.description:
What's new

  • Music widget - control Spotify and Apple Music with album art in three design styles and background customization.
  • Weather widget - live weather in 9 styles
  • Liquid Glass Theme now is Free
  • Open over full screen apps - new option in settings
  • Auto Folder Grouping + Launchpad layout restore (available under sort button)
  • Uninstall Apps - delete apps, cache and leftovers files
  • New right click on empty space menu for fast access to Settings, Wallpaper and Widgets
  • Gestures Invoke - you can choose between 3,4,5 fingers pinch
  • Fixed smooth mouse wheel pages scrolling
